hero.description: I build interfaces that people actually enjoy using. Right now I'm focused on React — turning designs into fast, accessible UIs and figuring out the cleanest way to manage state without overcomplicating things.

points: Optimized the Asset Management System UI by restructuring React components, significantly reducing re-render cycles and improving dashboard responsiveness.
Implemented workflow modules for asset assignment, return, and maintenance using REST API integration for real-time updates.
Enhanced front-end performance by refining state management and optimizing component-level logic.
Developed key features for a Food Truck Management Web App — order processing, vendor tracking, and route scheduling.
Resolved UI/UX issues through debugging, usability analysis, and accurate API-based rendering.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to reduce UI defect rates and enhance overall system reliability.
Developed a secure UID-authenticated online voting platform ensuring robust user validation integrity.
Built a clean, user-friendly interface integrated with a backend database for efficient data management.
Assisted with UI development, testing, and iterative refinement based on feedback cycles.

featured.title: @nexgensis/core
featured.subtitle: Component Library
featured.description: Created and published a 73-component enterprise UI library using React, Ant Design 5, Tailwind CSS, and Lucide icons. Features a custom theming engine, full light/dark mode, live documentation site with interactive previews, and dual ES/UMD builds.

list.title: Asset Management System
list.description: Rebuilt dashboard with optimized React components, reducing re-renders and improving load times. Integrated REST APIs for asset assignment, return, and maintenance workflows.

list.title: Food Truck Management App
list.description: Built order processing, vendor tracking, and route scheduling modules. Enhanced usability through UI/UX debugging and accurate real-time data rendering with Redux state.

list.title: MovieFlix
list.description: Interactive recommendation platform with search, filters, ratings, and reviews. Collaborative filtering for personalized content suggestions across all devices.

list.title: UID-Auth Voting Platform
list.description: Secure online voting system with UID-based authentication, clean UI, and robust backend integration ensuring data integrity and user validation.

bio: I'm a Front-End React Developer from Pune, building performant, accessible, and visually refined web applications. My focus is on clean component architecture, efficient state management, and delivering real value through code.
With a background in Electronics & Telecommunications Engineering and hands-on experience in enterprise product development, I bridge the gap between design intent and technical implementation.
I enjoy creating tools that other developers love to use — from large-scale dashboards to open-source component libraries.

highlights.title: Projects
highlights.description: Live products shipped to real users

footer.tagline: Building performant, accessible, and visually refined web applications from Pune, India.
